title: Cheiropteris palmatopedata
taxonomy: Cheiropteris palmatopedata is a species of fern within the family Cheiropleuriaceae. It belongs to the class Polypodiopsida and the division Pteridophyta. Within the class Polypodiopsida, Cheiropteris palmatopedata falls under the subclass Polypodiidae and the order Polypodiales. The order Polypodiales is further divided into the family Cheiropleuriaceae and the genus Cheiropteris. Cheiropteris palmatopedata is a unique species within this classification.

This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine, and its health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma.
